RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNYDER, JONATHAN $1,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,975.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST RANDY PRADO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
